nasb.text: Let no unwholesome word proceed from your mouth, but only such a word as is good for edification according to the need of the moment, so that it will give grace to those who hear.

esv.text: Let no corrupting talk come out of your mouths, but only such as is good for building up, as fits the occasion, that it may give grace to those who hear.

cnv.text: 一句壞話也不可出口，卻要適當地說造就人的好話，使聽見的人得益處。

ccb.text: 污言秽语一句都不可出口，要随时随地说造就人的好话，使听的人得益处。

csbs.text: 任何坏话都不可出口，而是按着需要说造就人的好话，使听的人得到益处。
